name: agent-agent
tagline: Persona for a GOAP-style goal planner that plans and replans actions via sublinear-solver and claude-flow MCP tools.
verdict: Same placeholder-description pattern as related skills: near-empty trigger text, and a name mismatch between two stacked frontmatter blocks. Body is an ~820-line design doc of illustrative pseudocode calling undefined helper functions, with no defined output artifact, undeclared niche MCP dependencies, and no version/changelog signal - reads as a spec, not.

highlights.summary: Description 'Agent skill for agent - invoke with $agent-agent' discloses nothing, yet body auto-spawns 12-agent swarms and trains neural nets.
description is literally 'Agent skill for agent - invoke with $agent-agent', no situations named.
No exclusions or out-of-scope guidance anywhere.
